project_type: AWS CDK Infrastructure-as-Code in C# (.NET 8) for a sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: dotnet CLI, CDK CLI via npx
test_framework: xUnit with CDK Assertions (C#), Python unittest/pytest (Lambda)
verification_instructions: This is a documentation-only change. Verify all markdown links resolve correctly and no build regressions.
environment_constraints: Shallow git clone (grafted). Cannot unshallow. Network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY (GitHub access only, no package registries). Use pre-installed .NET 9 with RollForward.
contribution_requirements: Documentation files use UPPER_CASE.md naming. All docs live in docs/ directory. Conventional commits required.
key_patterns: Documentation-only task. The project uses Mermaid diagrams, has a Documentation table in README.md linking to docs/, and follows a pattern of comprehensive markdown documents with clear section structure.
